mapper.select: select tea.username, c.course_name, ep.title, ep.duration,ec.start_time,ec.end_time,sc.course_id,ec.status,ec.id from exam_course ec INNER JOIN course c ON ec.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON ec.paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN user tea ON c.teacher_id = tea.id inner join student_course sc on c.id = sc.course_id where c.course_name = #{courseId} AND sc.student_id = #{userid}

select c.course_name from course c inner join student_course sc on c.id = sc.course_id inner join user u on u.id = sc.student_id where sc.student_id = #{userid}
and c.course_name like concat('%',#{classname},'%')
